description:
Welcome to a typical family apartment in Beijing, China! This is our home, for the time being, as we stay with a Chinese family.
In this video, we want to show you a typical family apartment in Beijing. We will give you a full apartment tour, reveal the price (we were shocked!), tell you the costs of living here in 2024 (including utility bills), and explain the different types of houses and apartments in China.
This apartment is located on the outskirts of Beijing, in a suburb called Wangjing. This is how people in China really live.

#china #reallife #life #beijing #lifeinchina #apartment #china2024 #housing #chinalife
